sourceCollection.name: Englishphile Content Pack 002 All-in-One
sourceCollection.description: All split files from Englishphile Content Pack 002 combined for quick one-shot import. Do not import together with split files.
sourceCollection.copyrightNote: Original Englishphile Content Pack 002 generated for internal educational use; not copied verbatim from uploaded worksheets or third-party books.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The minister's statement was criticised for its apparent _____ towards rural schools.
questions.explanation: The sentence needs a noun meaning lack of concern.

questions.prompt: Her explanation was admirable for its _____, even though the issue was complex.
The committee rejected the plan because it was financially _____.
questions.explanation: The context means the plan cannot continue financially.

questions.prompt: The witness gave a _____ account of the accident, so the police trusted his version.
The charity works to reduce social _____ in remote communities.
questions.explanation: The phrase 'social inequality' is the natural collocation.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: She handled the criticism with remarkable _____ and refused to respond angrily.
questions.explanation: The sentence needs a noun after 'with remarkable'.

questions.prompt: The new rules are intended to _____ the application process for all candidates.
His argument sounded persuasive, but it was built on a _____ assumption.
The museum is planning an _____ of rare manuscripts next spring.
questions.explanation: An exhibition is a public display.

questions.prompt: The mayor's decision was deeply _____ because it ignored expert advice.
questions.explanation: The context is negative: lacking responsibility.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The athlete's recovery was surprisingly _____ considering the severity of the injury.
The article offered an unusually _____ analysis of the election results.
The speaker's tone was calm but unmistakably _____.
The company apologised for the _____ caused by the delayed delivery.
The teacher praised the student's _____ in revising such a difficult essay.
questions.explanation: The sentence needs an abstract noun.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The evidence was too _____ to support such a serious accusation.
The village remained almost _____ by modern tourism.
The judge questioned the _____ of the witness's memory.
The instructions were so _____ that several candidates misunderstood the task.
The new policy aims to _____ access to advanced courses.
questions.explanation: To broaden access = make it wider.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 05
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: Her _____ to accept responsibility made the situation worse.
questions.explanation: A noun is needed after possessive 'her'.

questions.prompt: The research team made a _____ discovery about language learning.
His apology sounded _____ rather than sincere.
questions.explanation: Mechanical can mean automatic and lacking feeling.

questions.prompt: The plan failed because of poor _____ between the two departments.
The essay was criticised for its _____ use of evidence.
questions.explanation: Selective use means choosing only convenient evidence.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 06
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The director's _____ helped the actors understand the emotional tone of the scene.
The idea was dismissed as _____ because no one had tested it properly.
The school introduced measures to improve student _____.
The manager's response was _____ short and left many questions unanswered.
The journalist was known for her _____ pursuit of the truth.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 07
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The book is not merely informative but also highly _____.
The committee found the proposal _____ because it lacked a budget.
questions.explanation: Unacceptable means not able to be accepted.

questions.prompt: The candidate answered with impressive _____ under pressure.
The river became heavily _____ after years of industrial dumping.
questions.explanation: The river is described as polluted.

questions.prompt: A good teacher can make even abstract ideas _____.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 08
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The film's ending was deliberately _____, leaving viewers to decide what happened.
questions.explanation: Inconclusive means not giving a clear conclusion.

questions.prompt: The scientist warned that the results were _____ and should not be exaggerated.
questions.explanation: Preliminary already functions as an adjective.

questions.prompt: The principal spoke _____ about the need for discipline.
The two accounts of the incident were mutually _____.
His remarks were widely seen as _____ to younger colleagues.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 09
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The plan's main _____ is that it depends too heavily on volunteers.
The school encourages _____ thinking rather than memorisation.
questions.explanation: Independent thinking is thinking for oneself.

questions.prompt: The sudden change in policy caused considerable _____.
questions.explanation: Confusion is the state of being confused.

questions.prompt: The critic described the novel as _____ but uneven.
questions.explanation: Ambitious describes a work with high aims.

questions.prompt: The evidence was _____ enough to change the committee's mind.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 10
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The organisation has been praised for its financial _____.
questions.explanation: Financial transparency is openness about money.

questions.prompt: The coach demanded total _____ from every player.
The proposal was rejected because of its _____ impact on small businesses.
The novel explores the _____ between ambition and loyalty.
The speaker tried to _____ the audience with a dramatic opening story.
questions.explanation: To captivate means to hold attention.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 11
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The medication should be taken only under medical _____.
His _____ for detail made him an excellent proofreader.
The article was criticised for being politically _____.
The speaker's _____ was evident from the way she answered hostile questions.
The town is almost _____ after 9 p.m., with only a few shops open.

problems.title: Word Formation Intensive 002 Set 12
problems.statement: Điền dạng đúng của từ in hoa để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Chú ý loại từ, sắc thái nghĩa, tiền tố/phụ tố và collocation trong câu.

questions.prompt: The campaign was designed to raise public _____ of cyberbullying.
The machine stopped working because of a _____ in the cooling system.
The report was _____ edited to remove personal details.
The new law is _____ only if local authorities enforce it consistently.
questions.explanation: Effective means producing the intended result.

questions.prompt: The politician's statement was deliberately _____ to avoid offending either side.
questions.explanation: Vague already works as an adjective.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: I did not understand the importance of the decision until years later.

accepted: Only years later did I understand the importance of the decision.
answer.display: Only years later did I understand the importance of the decision.

metadata.originalSentence: I did not understand the importance of the decision until years later.
metadata.modelAnswer: Only years later did I understand the importance of the decision.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The storm was so violent that all flights were cancelled.

accepted: Such was the violence of the storm that all flights were cancelled.
answer.display: Such was the violence of the storm that all flights were cancelled.

metadata.originalSentence: The storm was so violent that all flights were cancelled.
metadata.modelAnswer: Such was the violence of the storm that all flights were cancelled.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He would never admit that he had made a mistake.

accepted: He would never own up to having made a mistake.
answer.display: He would never own up to having made a mistake.

metadata.originalSentence: He would never admit that he had made a mistake.
metadata.modelAnswer: He would never own up to having made a mistake.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The teacher did not tolerate rude behaviour under any circumstances.

accepted: Under no circumstances did the teacher tolerate rude behaviour.
answer.display: Under no circumstances did the teacher tolerate rude behaviour.

metadata.originalSentence: The teacher did not tolerate rude behaviour under any circumstances.
metadata.modelAnswer: Under no circumstances did the teacher tolerate rude behaviour.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They cancelled the picnic because the weather was terrible.

accepted: The picnic was cancelled on account of the terrible weather.
answer.display: The picnic was cancelled on account of the terrible weather.

metadata.originalSentence: They cancelled the picnic because the weather was terrible.
metadata.modelAnswer: The picnic was cancelled on account of the terrible weather.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She is much more experienced than the other applicants.

accepted: She is in a different league from the other applicants.
answer.display: She is in a different league from the other applicants.

questions.explanation: in a different league = far better.

metadata.originalSentence: She is much more experienced than the other applicants.
metadata.modelAnswer: She is in a different league from the other applicants.
metadata.grammarNote: in a different league = far better.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The manager refused to discuss the matter further.

accepted: The manager refused to be drawn into a further discussion of the matter.
answer.display: The manager refused to be drawn into a further discussion of the matter.

metadata.originalSentence: The manager refused to discuss the matter further.
metadata.modelAnswer: The manager refused to be drawn into a further discussion of the matter.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: I regret not taking his advice more seriously.

accepted: I wish I had taken his advice more seriously.
answer.display: I wish I had taken his advice more seriously.

questions.explanation: wish + past perfect for past regret.

metadata.originalSentence: I regret not taking his advice more seriously.
metadata.modelAnswer: I wish I had taken his advice more seriously.
metadata.grammarNote: wish + past perfect for past regret.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They were not allowed to enter until the security check was complete.

accepted: Not until the security check was complete were they allowed to enter.
answer.display: Not until the security check was complete were they allowed to enter.

metadata.originalSentence: They were not allowed to enter until the security check was complete.
metadata.modelAnswer: Not until the security check was complete were they allowed to enter.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The film was not nearly as good as the reviews suggested.

accepted: The film did not live up to the reviews.
answer.display: The film did not live up to the reviews.

metadata.originalSentence: The film was not nearly as good as the reviews suggested.
metadata.modelAnswer: The film did not live up to the reviews.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He was determined to finish the project despite his illness.

accepted: He was intent on finishing the project despite his illness.
answer.display: He was intent on finishing the project despite his illness.

metadata.originalSentence: He was determined to finish the project despite his illness.
metadata.modelAnswer: He was intent on finishing the project despite his illness.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The committee will approve the proposal only if the budget is reduced.

accepted: Only if the budget is reduced will the committee approve the proposal.
answer.display: Only if the budget is reduced will the committee approve the proposal.

questions.explanation: Only if + inversion in main clause.

metadata.originalSentence: The committee will approve the proposal only if the budget is reduced.
metadata.modelAnswer: Only if the budget is reduced will the committee approve the proposal.
metadata.grammarNote: Only if + inversion in main clause.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She immediately regretted sending the email.

accepted: No sooner had she sent the email than she regretted it.
answer.display: No sooner had she sent the email than she regretted it.

metadata.originalSentence: She immediately regretted sending the email.
metadata.modelAnswer: No sooner had she sent the email than she regretted it.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The children were too tired to continue the walk.

accepted: The children did not have enough energy to continue the walk.
answer.display: The children did not have enough energy to continue the walk.

metadata.originalSentence: The children were too tired to continue the walk.
metadata.modelAnswer: The children did not have enough energy to continue the walk.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He avoided answering the question directly.

metadata.originalSentence: He avoided answering the question directly.
metadata.modelAnswer: He sidestepped the question.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The company is unlikely to recover from such a huge loss.

accepted: There is little prospect of the company recovering from such a huge loss.
answer.display: There is little prospect of the company recovering from such a huge loss.

metadata.originalSentence: The company is unlikely to recover from such a huge loss.
metadata.modelAnswer: There is little prospect of the company recovering from such a huge loss.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She did not say a word during the entire meeting.

accepted: She remained silent throughout the entire meeting.
answer.display: She remained silent throughout the entire meeting.

metadata.originalSentence: She did not say a word during the entire meeting.
metadata.modelAnswer: She remained silent throughout the entire meeting.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The rescue team arrived just in time.

accepted: The rescue team arrived in the nick of time.
answer.display: The rescue team arrived in the nick of time.

questions.explanation: in the nick of time = just in time.

metadata.originalSentence: The rescue team arrived just in time.
metadata.modelAnswer: The rescue team arrived in the nick of time.
metadata.grammarNote: in the nick of time = just in time.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The candidate's confidence impressed the interviewers.

accepted: The candidate's confidence made an impression on the interviewers.
answer.display: The candidate's confidence made an impression on the interviewers.

metadata.originalSentence: The candidate's confidence impressed the interviewers.
metadata.modelAnswer: The candidate's confidence made an impression on the interviewers.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He found it hard to adapt to the new school.

accepted: He had difficulty adapting to the new school.
answer.display: He had difficulty adapting to the new school.

metadata.originalSentence: He found it hard to adapt to the new school.
metadata.modelAnswer: He had difficulty adapting to the new school.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 05
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They completed the task without any help from their teacher.

accepted: They completed the task on their own.
answer.display: They completed the task on their own.

metadata.originalSentence: They completed the task without any help from their teacher.
metadata.modelAnswer: They completed the task on their own.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The principal will not accept late submissions for any reason.

accepted: On no account will the principal accept late submissions.
answer.display: On no account will the principal accept late submissions.

metadata.originalSentence: The principal will not accept late submissions for any reason.
metadata.modelAnswer: On no account will the principal accept late submissions.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The debate became more heated after the final speaker's remarks.

accepted: The debate gathered heat after the final speaker's remarks.
answer.display: The debate gathered heat after the final speaker's remarks.

metadata.originalSentence: The debate became more heated after the final speaker's remarks.
metadata.modelAnswer: The debate gathered heat after the final speaker's remarks.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The singer's performance was so moving that many people cried.

accepted: So moving was the singer's performance that many people cried.
answer.display: So moving was the singer's performance that many people cried.

metadata.originalSentence: The singer's performance was so moving that many people cried.
metadata.modelAnswer: So moving was the singer's performance that many people cried.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: I am sure that he did not send the message deliberately.

accepted: He cannot have sent the message deliberately.
answer.display: He cannot have sent the message deliberately.

questions.explanation: can't/cannot have + past participle = certainty about the past.

metadata.originalSentence: I am sure that he did not send the message deliberately.
metadata.modelAnswer: He cannot have sent the message deliberately.
metadata.grammarNote: can't/cannot have + past participle = certainty about the past.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 06
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The school introduced the rule to prevent cheating.

accepted: The school introduced the rule with a view to preventing cheating.
answer.display: The school introduced the rule with a view to preventing cheating.

metadata.originalSentence: The school introduced the rule to prevent cheating.
metadata.modelAnswer: The school introduced the rule with a view to preventing cheating.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She strongly objected to being treated like a child.

accepted: She took strong exception to being treated like a child.
answer.display: She took strong exception to being treated like a child.

metadata.originalSentence: She strongly objected to being treated like a child.
metadata.modelAnswer: She took strong exception to being treated like a child.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The answer was obvious only after the teacher explained it.

accepted: Only after the teacher explained it was the answer obvious.
answer.display: Only after the teacher explained it was the answer obvious.

metadata.originalSentence: The answer was obvious only after the teacher explained it.
metadata.modelAnswer: Only after the teacher explained it was the answer obvious.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He has not visited his hometown for ten years.

accepted: It has been ten years since he last visited his hometown.
answer.display: It has been ten years since he last visited his hometown.

metadata.originalSentence: He has not visited his hometown for ten years.
metadata.modelAnswer: It has been ten years since he last visited his hometown.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The team lost because it lacked discipline.

accepted: The team's defeat was down to a lack of discipline.
answer.display: The team's defeat was down to a lack of discipline.

questions.explanation: be down to = be caused by.

metadata.originalSentence: The team lost because it lacked discipline.
metadata.modelAnswer: The team's defeat was down to a lack of discipline.
metadata.grammarNote: be down to = be caused by.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 07
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She suddenly remembered where she had left the keys.

accepted: It suddenly dawned on her where she had left the keys.
answer.display: It suddenly dawned on her where she had left the keys.

questions.explanation: It dawns on someone = someone realises.

metadata.originalSentence: She suddenly remembered where she had left the keys.
metadata.modelAnswer: It suddenly dawned on her where she had left the keys.
metadata.grammarNote: It dawns on someone = someone realises.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The project will succeed only if everyone cooperates.

accepted: Only if everyone cooperates will the project succeed.
answer.display: Only if everyone cooperates will the project succeed.

metadata.originalSentence: The project will succeed only if everyone cooperates.
metadata.modelAnswer: Only if everyone cooperates will the project succeed.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He was not responsible for the delay.

accepted: He was not to blame for the delay.
answer.display: He was not to blame for the delay.

metadata.originalSentence: He was not responsible for the delay.
metadata.modelAnswer: He was not to blame for the delay.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The two stories are completely different.

accepted: The two stories have nothing in common.
answer.display: The two stories have nothing in common.

metadata.originalSentence: The two stories are completely different.
metadata.modelAnswer: The two stories have nothing in common.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The lecturer spoke too quickly for us to take notes.

accepted: The lecturer did not speak slowly enough for us to take notes.
answer.display: The lecturer did not speak slowly enough for us to take notes.

metadata.originalSentence: The lecturer spoke too quickly for us to take notes.
metadata.modelAnswer: The lecturer did not speak slowly enough for us to take notes.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 08
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She never complains, however difficult the work is.

accepted: She never complains no matter how difficult the work is.
answer.display: She never complains no matter how difficult the work is.

metadata.originalSentence: She never complains, however difficult the work is.
metadata.modelAnswer: She never complains no matter how difficult the work is.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The news shocked everyone in the room.

accepted: The news came as a shock to everyone in the room.
answer.display: The news came as a shock to everyone in the room.

metadata.originalSentence: The news shocked everyone in the room.
metadata.modelAnswer: The news came as a shock to everyone in the room.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He said he was sorry, but I do not think he meant it.

accepted: I do not think his apology was sincere.
answer.display: I do not think his apology was sincere.

metadata.originalSentence: He said he was sorry, but I do not think he meant it.
metadata.modelAnswer: I do not think his apology was sincere.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They started the meeting immediately after the director arrived.

accepted: Hardly had the director arrived when they started the meeting.
answer.display: Hardly had the director arrived when they started the meeting.

metadata.originalSentence: They started the meeting immediately after the director arrived.
metadata.modelAnswer: Hardly had the director arrived when they started the meeting.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The teacher's advice helped me improve my essay.

accepted: I benefited from the teacher's advice when improving my essay.
answer.display: I benefited from the teacher's advice when improving my essay.

metadata.originalSentence: The teacher's advice helped me improve my essay.
metadata.modelAnswer: I benefited from the teacher's advice when improving my essay.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 09
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He was too proud to ask for help.

accepted: His pride prevented him from asking for help.
answer.display: His pride prevented him from asking for help.

metadata.originalSentence: He was too proud to ask for help.
metadata.modelAnswer: His pride prevented him from asking for help.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The audience was completely silent during her speech.

accepted: You could have heard a pin drop during her speech.
answer.display: You could have heard a pin drop during her speech.

metadata.originalSentence: The audience was completely silent during her speech.
metadata.modelAnswer: You could have heard a pin drop during her speech.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The proposal is likely to be rejected.

accepted: The chances are that the proposal will be rejected.
answer.display: The chances are that the proposal will be rejected.

metadata.originalSentence: The proposal is likely to be rejected.
metadata.modelAnswer: The chances are that the proposal will be rejected.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He did not realise how tired he was until he sat down.

accepted: Not until he sat down did he realise how tired he was.
answer.display: Not until he sat down did he realise how tired he was.

metadata.originalSentence: He did not realise how tired he was until he sat down.
metadata.modelAnswer: Not until he sat down did he realise how tired he was.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The shop assistant persuaded me to buy a more expensive model.

accepted: The shop assistant talked me into buying a more expensive model.
answer.display: The shop assistant talked me into buying a more expensive model.

metadata.originalSentence: The shop assistant persuaded me to buy a more expensive model.
metadata.modelAnswer: The shop assistant talked me into buying a more expensive model.

problems.title: Sentence Transformation Intensive 002 Set 10
problems.statement: Viết lại câu sao cho nghĩa không đổi.
problems.instructions: Ưu tiên cấu trúc đảo ngữ, idiom, fixed phrases và paraphrase học thuật.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: They will have to postpone the event if it rains.

accepted: They will have to put off the event if it rains.
answer.display: They will have to put off the event if it rains.

metadata.originalSentence: They will have to postpone the event if it rains.
metadata.modelAnswer: They will have to put off the event if it rains.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: She was the only person who understood the joke.

accepted: Apart from her, nobody understood the joke.
answer.display: Apart from her, nobody understood the joke.

metadata.originalSentence: She was the only person who understood the joke.
metadata.modelAnswer: Apart from her, nobody understood the joke.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: I did not expect the exam to be so difficult.

accepted: I was taken aback by how difficult the exam was.
answer.display: I was taken aback by how difficult the exam was.

metadata.originalSentence: I did not expect the exam to be so difficult.
metadata.modelAnswer: I was taken aback by how difficult the exam was.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: He contributed very little to the discussion.

accepted: He made little contribution to the discussion.
answer.display: He made little contribution to the discussion.

metadata.originalSentence: He contributed very little to the discussion.
metadata.modelAnswer: He made little contribution to the discussion.

questions.prompt: Rewrite the sentence so that it has a similar meaning: The issue should be dealt with immediately.

accepted: The issue should receive immediate attention.
answer.display: The issue should receive immediate attention.

metadata.originalSentence: The issue should be dealt with immediately.
metadata.modelAnswer: The issue should receive immediate attention.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The committee decided to _____ a compromise after hours of debate.
The new evidence casts serious _____ on his original account.
questions.explanation: cast doubt on = make something seem uncertain.

questions.prompt: She has a remarkable _____ for remembering names.
questions.explanation: a gift for + -ing/noun is the natural collocation.

questions.prompt: The company is trying to _____ its reputation after the scandal.
questions.explanation: restore one's reputation is the strongest collocation.

questions.prompt: The principal paid _____ to the students who volunteered after the flood.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: His comments gave _____ to rumours that he was planning to resign.
questions.explanation: give fuel to rumours = make rumours stronger.

questions.prompt: The plan was rejected on the _____ that it was too costly.
She took _____ with the suggestion that the work was easy.
The two countries finally _____ diplomatic relations after a decade of tension.
His speech struck a _____ with many young voters.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The article makes a _____ case for reform.
questions.explanation: make a strong case for something.

questions.prompt: The city has seen a sharp _____ in petty crime.
questions.explanation: a sharp rise in crime is natural.

questions.prompt: The charity relies _____ on donations from the public.
The scandal dealt a severe _____ to public confidence.
He has a _____ knowledge of local history.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The judge drew a clear _____ between mistake and deliberate deception.
questions.explanation: draw a line/distinction; here 'line' fits best.

questions.prompt: The issue should be given _____ priority.
Her parents _____ great importance to academic success.
questions.explanation: attach great importance to = consider very important.

questions.prompt: The government came under _____ pressure to change the law.
His apology rang _____ to everyone in the room.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 05
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The discovery opened _____ new avenues of research.
The teacher drew our _____ to a subtle error in the paragraph.
The plan is still in its _____ and may change completely.
questions.explanation: in its infancy = at an early stage.

questions.prompt: The evidence is _____ from conclusive.
She refused to _____ defeat even when the situation looked hopeless.
questions.explanation: concede defeat is the strongest collocation.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 06
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The policy has attracted _____ criticism from experts.
The problem lies _____ the way the data was collected.
questions.explanation: lie in = be found in/consist in.

questions.prompt: They reached a _____ after months of negotiation.
The accident brought traffic to a complete _____.
The speech was intended to _____ support for the campaign.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 07
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: He is widely _____ as one of the best young debaters.
The teacher's patience was beginning to wear _____.
The principal made it _____ clear that cheating would not be tolerated.
The report sheds _____ on the causes of the accident.
The new rules came _____ effect last Monday.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 08
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: She has no _____ of changing her decision.
The company suffered a _____ loss in the first quarter.
His explanation left much to be _____.
questions.explanation: leave much to be desired = be unsatisfactory.

questions.prompt: The announcement took everyone by _____.
They are _____ aware of the risks involved.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 09
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The mayor pledged to _____ the problem of homelessness.
His confidence borders _____ arrogance.
The debate gave _____ to several important questions.
The results are _____ with our earlier findings.
The committee is _____ to reject the application.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 10
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: The article is _____ with factual errors.
The new law will place a heavy _____ on small businesses.
The student's answer was _____ the point.
The school puts strong _____ on independent learning.
The evidence points _____ a different conclusion.

problems.title: Collocation and Vocabulary MCQ 002 Set 11
problems.statement: Chọn đáp án đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào collocation, preposition pattern, idiom và lexical precision.

questions.prompt: Her remarks were open _____ misinterpretation.
The plan failed to take _____ of local conditions.
The witness was _____ to tears by the lawyer's questions.
The findings will have far-reaching _____.
The team made a _____ effort to finish before the deadline.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: The meeting was _____ because the director was ill.
She _____ the old letters while cleaning the attic.
The company had to _____ several employees during the recession.
He tried to _____ his nervousness with a joke.
The new evidence _____ his claim that he was elsewhere.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: She refused to _____ to pressure from her classmates.
The teacher asked us to _____ the key points of the article.
The plan _____ because no one was willing to fund it.
The smell of smoke _____ memories of his childhood home.
The committee will _____ the proposal at the next meeting.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: He _____ the difficult word in an online dictionary.
The scandal _____ serious questions about accountability.
questions.explanation: raise questions is not a phrasal verb but the best collocation here.

questions.prompt: The athlete managed to _____ from an early injury.
The school decided to _____ a new reading programme.
The speaker kept _____ the same point.
questions.explanation: come back to = return to a topic.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: Do not _____ your notes until the exam starts.
questions.explanation: put away = place out of sight/store.

questions.prompt: The teacher _____ the instructions once more for clarity.
We need to _____ the weaker arguments from the essay.
Her talent really _____ during the final debate.
He _____ the story to make himself sound braver.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 05
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: The charity is trying to _____ enough money for a new library.
She _____ the job offer after discussing it with her parents.
The lights suddenly _____ during the storm.
His explanation did not _____ to me.
The police are trying to _____ who leaked the document.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 06
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: The student _____ a convincing argument in her essay.
They _____ a small business after graduating.
The project _____ more difficult than expected.
He promised to _____ the matter with the principal.
questions.explanation: take up a matter = raise/discuss it.

questions.prompt: The old rule was finally _____.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 07
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: The class _____ laughing when the projector failed again.
questions.explanation: burst into laughter is the natural phrase.

questions.prompt: Her confidence _____ as the interview progressed.
The government promised to _____ the causes of unemployment.
The noise made it hard to _____ what the speaker was saying.
He _____ his success to years of disciplined practice.
questions.explanation: put something down to = attribute to.

problems.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice 002 Set 08
problems.statement: Chọn phrasal verb/cụm động từ phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Chú ý nghĩa trong ngữ cảnh và giới từ/tiểu từ đi kèm.

questions.prompt: The teacher _____ the essays on Friday.
Please _____ your homework before leaving.
The argument _____ after both sides apologised.
The speaker failed to _____ his message clearly.
She _____ the missing paragraph from her final draft.

problems.title: Transitions and Discourse Markers 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Chọn discourse marker phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Xác định quan hệ logic: contrast, result, addition, clarification, sequence.

questions.prompt: The proposal is ambitious. _____, it lacks a realistic budget.
The experiment was repeated several times; _____, the results remained unchanged.
questions.explanation: Nevertheless contrasts repeated attempts with unchanged results.

questions.prompt: The school has invested in new facilities. _____, teachers have received extra training.
The evidence was incomplete. _____, the committee postponed its decision.
Some students prefer self-study; _____, others need direct guidance.

problems.title: Transitions and Discourse Markers 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Chọn discourse marker phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Xác định quan hệ logic: contrast, result, addition, clarification, sequence.

questions.prompt: The article is persuasive; _____, its conclusion is too broad.
The first solution is cheap. _____, the second is more reliable.
questions.explanation: On the other hand introduces an alternative contrast.

questions.prompt: He ignored the warning signs. _____, the problem became much worse.
The writer uses statistics to support her claim. _____, she includes personal anecdotes.
The task is difficult; _____, it is not impossible.

problems.title: Transitions and Discourse Markers 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Chọn discourse marker phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Xác định quan hệ logic: contrast, result, addition, clarification, sequence.

questions.prompt: Many people blame technology for distraction. _____, poor study habits are also responsible.
The city has improved public transport. _____, traffic congestion remains severe.
questions.explanation: Even so introduces an unexpected contrast.

questions.prompt: The essay lacks examples. _____, the argument feels abstract.
questions.explanation: As a result links cause and effect.

questions.prompt: The candidate was confident and fluent. _____, she answered questions precisely.
The policy may reduce costs. _____, it could lower the quality of service.

problems.title: Transitions and Discourse Markers 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Chọn discourse marker phù hợp nhất.
problems.instructions: Xác định quan hệ logic: contrast, result, addition, clarification, sequence.

questions.prompt: The passage criticises consumerism. _____, it warns against measuring success by possessions.
questions.explanation: In other words rephrases the idea.

questions.prompt: The instructions were unclear. _____, several candidates answered the wrong question.
The first paragraph defines the problem. _____, the second paragraph explores its causes.
questions.explanation: Subsequently marks the next stage in sequence.

questions.prompt: The solution sounds simple. _____, implementing it would require years of planning.
questions.explanation: In practice contrasts theory with implementation.

questions.prompt: The writer does not reject technology. _____, she argues for more responsible use.

problems.title: Grammar Focus: Inversion and Conditionals 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Chọn cấu trúc ngữ pháp chính xác nhất.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào đảo ngữ, conditional forms, subjunctive và comparative structures.

questions.prompt: Never before _____ such a difficult transformation question.
Had I known about the deadline, I _____ the essay earlier.
questions.explanation: Third conditional inversion: Had I known..., I would have...

questions.prompt: Only after the results were announced _____ the mistake.
questions.explanation: Only after + inversion in main clause.

questions.prompt: Not only _____ the answer, but she also explained the method.
questions.explanation: Not only at the start requires inversion.

questions.prompt: Were the school to change the timetable, many students _____ affected.
questions.explanation: Formal second conditional inversion: Were + subject + to V.

problems.title: Grammar Focus: Inversion and Conditionals 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Chọn cấu trúc ngữ pháp chính xác nhất.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào đảo ngữ, conditional forms, subjunctive và comparative structures.

questions.prompt: No sooner had the bell rung _____ the students rushed out.
Scarcely had the speaker begun _____ the microphone stopped working.
Under no circumstances _____ your password with anyone.
If it _____ for her advice, I would have made a serious mistake.
questions.explanation: If it hadn't been for = without past help.

questions.prompt: Were it not for public support, the charity _____ survive.
questions.explanation: Were it not for = without; use would.

problems.title: Grammar Focus: Inversion and Conditionals 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Chọn cấu trúc ngữ pháp chính xác nhất.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào đảo ngữ, conditional forms, subjunctive và comparative structures.

questions.prompt: Supposing you _____ the scholarship, what would you do first?
questions.explanation: Supposing + past simple for hypothetical present/future.

questions.prompt: It is essential that every candidate _____ the instructions carefully.
The more carefully you revise, _____ mistakes you will make.
Little _____ that his comment would cause such controversy.
questions.explanation: Little at the front requires inversion.

questions.prompt: So convincing _____ that the committee approved the plan immediately.

problems.title: Grammar Focus: Inversion and Conditionals 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Chọn cấu trúc ngữ pháp chính xác nhất.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào đảo ngữ, conditional forms, subjunctive và comparative structures.

questions.prompt: Should you _____ any difficulty, contact the exam supervisor.
The report recommends that the rule _____ revised.
Not until the final paragraph _____ the writer's real opinion.
But for the librarian's help, we _____ the archive so quickly.
questions.explanation: But for + noun = if it hadn't been for.

questions.prompt: Only by comparing the two texts _____ the difference in tone.
questions.explanation: Only by + -ing requires inversion in main clause.

problems.title: Error Identification 002 Set 01
problems.statement: Xác định lỗi sai và viết phần sửa đúng.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào lỗi ngữ pháp nâng cao: agreement, inversion, preposition pattern, verb pattern.

questions.prompt: Despite of his careful preparation, he still felt nervous before the interview.

metadata.sentence: Despite of his careful preparation, he still felt nervous before the interview.

questions.prompt: The number of students taking advanced English have increased steadily.

metadata.sentence: The number of students taking advanced English have increased steadily.

questions.prompt: Hardly the teacher had entered the room when the students became silent.

answer.display: A: Hardly had the teacher entered

questions.explanation: Hardly at the beginning requires inversion.

metadata.sentence: Hardly the teacher had entered the room when the students became silent.

questions.prompt: She suggested me to rewrite the introduction more clearly.

answer.correction: suggested that I rewrite / suggested rewriting
answer.display: B: suggested that I rewrite / suggested rewriting

questions.explanation: Suggest is not followed by object + to-infinitive.

metadata.sentence: She suggested me to rewrite the introduction more clearly.
metadata.correction: suggested that I rewrite / suggested rewriting

questions.prompt: The essay was too much vague to convince the examiner.

metadata.sentence: The essay was too much vague to convince the examiner.

problems.title: Error Identification 002 Set 02
problems.statement: Xác định lỗi sai và viết phần sửa đúng.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào lỗi ngữ pháp nâng cao: agreement, inversion, preposition pattern, verb pattern.

questions.prompt: Not only he solved the problem, but he also explained it beautifully.

answer.display: A: Not only did he solve

questions.explanation: Not only at the beginning requires inversion.

metadata.sentence: Not only he solved the problem, but he also explained it beautifully.

questions.prompt: The data shows that students who read widely tend to write better essays.
questions.explanation: Data is treated as plural in formal academic English here.

metadata.sentence: The data shows that students who read widely tend to write better essays.

questions.prompt: I look forward to hear from you after the interview.

metadata.sentence: I look forward to hear from you after the interview.

questions.prompt: The principal insisted that every student wears the school badge.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive: insist that someone do something.

metadata.sentence: The principal insisted that every student wears the school badge.

questions.prompt: There is little evidences to support such a strong conclusion.

metadata.sentence: There is little evidences to support such a strong conclusion.

problems.title: Error Identification 002 Set 03
problems.statement: Xác định lỗi sai và viết phần sửa đúng.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào lỗi ngữ pháp nâng cao: agreement, inversion, preposition pattern, verb pattern.

questions.prompt: The report was consisted of three sections and an appendix.

metadata.sentence: The report was consisted of three sections and an appendix.

questions.prompt: The committee discussed about the proposal for nearly two hours.

metadata.sentence: The committee discussed about the proposal for nearly two hours.

questions.prompt: He is one of the students who has submitted the assignment early.

metadata.sentence: He is one of the students who has submitted the assignment early.

questions.prompt: No sooner the test began than the fire alarm went off.

answer.correction: No sooner had the test begun
answer.display: A: No sooner had the test begun

questions.explanation: No sooner requires inversion and past perfect.

metadata.sentence: No sooner the test began than the fire alarm went off.
metadata.correction: No sooner had the test begun

questions.prompt: The teacher made us to revise the paragraph again.

metadata.sentence: The teacher made us to revise the paragraph again.

problems.title: Error Identification 002 Set 04
problems.statement: Xác định lỗi sai và viết phần sửa đúng.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào lỗi ngữ pháp nâng cao: agreement, inversion, preposition pattern, verb pattern.

questions.prompt: The reason why he failed was because he ignored the instructions.

answer.display: B: that he ignored / he ignored

metadata.sentence: The reason why he failed was because he ignored the instructions.

questions.prompt: This is a highly recommended course for students who are interested to academic writing.

metadata.sentence: This is a highly recommended course for students who are interested to academic writing.

questions.prompt: Each of the candidates were asked to prepare a short speech.

metadata.sentence: Each of the candidates were asked to prepare a short speech.

questions.prompt: The article provides many useful informations about exam strategies.

answer.correction: much useful information / many useful pieces of information
answer.display: A: much useful information / many useful pieces of information

metadata.sentence: The article provides many useful informations about exam strategies.
metadata.correction: much useful information / many useful pieces of information

questions.prompt: Only after reading the passage carefully I understood the writer's attitude.
questions.explanation: Only after at the beginning requires inversion.

metadata.sentence: Only after reading the passage carefully I understood the writer's attitude.

problems.title: Error Identification 002 Set 05
problems.statement: Xác định lỗi sai và viết phần sửa đúng.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào lỗi ngữ pháp nâng cao: agreement, inversion, preposition pattern, verb pattern.

questions.prompt: She is used to work under pressure because she has joined many competitions.

metadata.sentence: She is used to work under pressure because she has joined many competitions.

questions.prompt: The school provided students with a large amount of opportunities to practise speaking.

answer.display: A: a large number of opportunities

metadata.sentence: The school provided students with a large amount of opportunities to practise speaking.

questions.prompt: The novel was so bored that I stopped reading after two chapters.
questions.explanation: Boring describes the novel; bored describes a person.

metadata.sentence: The novel was so bored that I stopped reading after two chapters.

questions.prompt: Had he listened to the advice, he will not have made that mistake.
questions.explanation: Third conditional requires would have + past participle.

metadata.sentence: Had he listened to the advice, he will not have made that mistake.

questions.prompt: The students were made rewrite their essays after receiving feedback.
questions.explanation: Passive form: be made to + infinitive.

metadata.sentence: The students were made rewrite their essays after receiving feedback.

problems.title: Error Identification 002 Set 06
problems.statement: Xác định lỗi sai và viết phần sửa đúng.
problems.instructions: Tập trung vào lỗi ngữ pháp nâng cao: agreement, inversion, preposition pattern, verb pattern.

questions.prompt: She denied to have copied the paragraph from the website.

answer.display: A: denied having copied / denied copying

metadata.sentence: She denied to have copied the paragraph from the website.

questions.prompt: The passage raises an important question of whether success should be measured by wealth.

answer.correction: question as to whether / question whether
answer.display: A: question as to whether / question whether

questions.explanation: Natural pattern: question whether/as to whether.

metadata.sentence: The passage raises an important question of whether success should be measured by wealth.
metadata.correction: question as to whether / question whether

questions.prompt: Under no circumstances students should leave the room during the test.

metadata.sentence: Under no circumstances students should leave the room during the test.

questions.prompt: The more you practise, your answers become more accurate.

answer.correction: the more accurate your answers become
answer.display: A: the more accurate your answers become

metadata.sentence: The more you practise, your answers become more accurate.
metadata.correction: the more accurate your answers become

questions.prompt: The teacher advised that the essay was rewritten before submission.

metadata.sentence: The teacher advised that the essay was rewritten before submission.
